# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder_14b)
# Prompt: Create Kubernetes deployment manifests for microservices. Add annotations to control Istio sidecar injection behavior. Set sidecar.istio.io/inject to manage proxy injection per deployment. This is for our service mesh deployment strategy.
# Category: istio_sidecar_injection_disabled

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: microservice-1
  annotations:
    sidecar.istio.io/inject: "true"
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: microservice-1
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: microservice-1
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: microservice-1-container
        image: my-repo/microservice-1:v1
        ports:
        - containerPort: 80

---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: microservice-2
  annotations:
    sidecar.istio.io/inject: "false"
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: microservice-2
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: microservice-2
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: microservice-2-container
        image: my-repo/microservice-2:v1
        ports:
        - containerPort: 80

---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: microservice-3
  annotations:
    sidecar.istio.io/inject: "true"
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: microservice-3
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: microservice-3
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: microservice-3-container
        image: my-repo/microservice-3:v1
        ports:
        - containerPort: 80
